quit.substances.cannabis.activities.vivi: Describe every detail you remember — colors, people, emotions...
quit.substances.stimulants.activities.pl: Did anything feel even slightly good today?
A warm shower, a funny text, sunshine on your face...
Compared to last week, is pleasure...
quit.substances.benzodiazepines.activiti: Hold gently for 2 counts. No strain.
Exhale through pursed lips for 8 counts. The long exhale is the key — it stimulates your vagus nerve.
Pause for 2 counts. Let your body settle before the next breath.
quit.substances.kratom.activities.root-c: What were you originally treating with kratom?
Chronic pain? Social anxiety? Low energy? Depression?
Is that original issue better, worse, or the same without kratom?
One thing you can do TODAY to address that root cause
Schedule a doctor visit, try a stretch routine, call a therapist...
